title: IoT
description: Native IoT workspace: realm/asset tree, typed attribute workbench with live values and history charts over iot_datapoints, alarms, rulesets and protocol-agent connection context. Ported from OpenRemote; reads the CTOX iot_* projections only and writes via business_commands. Shipping scope (Phases 0-7): assets, typed attributes, datapoints (all/interval/lttb), alarms lifecycle, ruleset/agent records, and the MQTT protocol agent with multi-realm isolation, bounded/coalesced telemetry, and secret redaction. DEFERRED (planned, not broken): Groovy/JS/Flow rule execution, HTTP/WebSocket protocol agents beyond MQTT, forecasting/prediction, and gateway federation — see docs/iot-operations.md §Deferred.

layout.left: Realm scope selector, asset hierarchy tree and search/filter
layout.center: Selected asset typed-attribute workbench, live values, native datapoint chart and optional map
layout.right: Open alarms, ruleset status and protocol agent / connection context

store.summary: Native IoT asset & telemetry workspace (assets, attributes, datapoints, alarms, rulesets, MQTT agent) with multi-realm isolation, bounded/coalesced telemetry and secret redaction. Ported from OpenRemote. DEFERRED (planned, not broken): Groovy/JS/Flow rule execution, non-MQTT protocol agents, forecasting, and gateway federation.
